ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "field_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the field */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the season */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the opponent */,
  "opponent_name" TEXT /* Name of the opponent */,
  "innings_played" INTEGER /* Number of innings played */,
  "extras" INTEGER /* Flag for extra innings */,
  "runs_scored" INTEGER /* Total runs scored by the team */,
  "runs_allowed" INTEGER /* Total runs allowed by the team */,
  "run_difference" INTEGER /* Run difference (runs scored - runs allowed) */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game (win/loss) */,
  "score" TEXT /* Score of the game */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the school */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES opponents ("opponent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the school the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the player (e.g., captain) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stats_player_seq" INTEGER /* Sequence identifier for the player's game stats */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the game the stats belong to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the player */,
  "AB" INTEGER /* At bats (AB) in the game */,
  "H" INTEGER /* Hits (H) in the game */,
  "TB" INTEGER /* Total bases (TB) in the game */,
  "R" INTEGER /* Runs (R) scored by the player */,
  "2B" INTEGER /* Doubles (2B) hit by the player */,
  "3B" INTEGER /* Triples (3B) hit by the player */,
  "HR" INTEGER /* Home runs (HR) hit by the player */,
  "RBI" INTEGER /* Runs batted in (RBI) */,
  "BB" INTEGER /* Walks (BB) */,
  "HBP" INTEGER /* Hit by pitch (HBP) */,
  "SF" INTEGER /* Sacrifice flies (SF) */,
  "SH" INTEGER /* Sacrifice hits (SH) */,
  "K" INTEGER /* Strikeouts (K) */,
  "DP" INTEGER /* Double plays (DP) involved */,
  "SB" INTEGER /* Stolen bases (SB) */,
  "CS" INTEGER /* Caught stealing (CS) */,
  "Picked" INTEGER /* Picked off (Picked) */,
  "IBB" INTEGER /* Intentional walks (IBB) */,
  "batting_average" REAL /* Batting average */,
  "on_base_percentage" REAL /* On-base percentage */,
  "slugging_percentage" REAL /* Slugging percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stats_player_seq"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "opponents" (
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each opponent */,
  "opponent_name" TEXT /* Name of the opponent team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("opponent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "school_type" TEXT /* Type of school (e.g., public, private) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the school */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the school's field */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fields" (
  "field_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each field */,
  "field_type" TEXT /* Type of field (e.g., home, away) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("field_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game result summary */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the game associated */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the game's result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_results_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., coach, analyst) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Password hash for authentication */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the user's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the user who accessed the system */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "data_accessed" TEXT /* Data accessed by the user */,
  "data_modified" TEXT /* Data modified by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the school the coach belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_coaches" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the player */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id", "coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the game the injury occurred in */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the player who got injured */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., minor, major) */,
  "injury_description" TEXT /* Description of the injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_injuries_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_ejections" (
  "ejection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ejection */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the game the ejection occurred in */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the player who got ejected */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the ejection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ejection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_ejections_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_ejections_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game schedule */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "field_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the field */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the opponent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_schedules_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)
column_names: Total runs scored by the team
Total runs allowed by the team
Identifier for the school the player belongs to
